name: Confidence Builder
description: Beginner-intermediate program introducing dumbbells and cables alongside machines. Three-day rotation: Upper, Lower, and Foundation Strength (bone density focus). 3-4x/week.

weeks.description: Introductory week for familiarizing ourselves and our bodies with new exercises.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

weeks.description: Gradual intensification - less reps held back in reserve (RIR).

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

weeks.description: Holding stead with current intensity before peak intensity.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

weeks.description: Peak intensity. Try your best to do hard sets - leaving less in the tank!

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Hinge at hips, slight knee bend. Bar stays close to legs. Stop when you feel a deep hamstring stretch.

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.notes: Feet high on the pad is easier. Feet low requires greater flexibility and strength. Don't lock out knees at the top. Control the eccentric.

weeks.name: Deload
weeks.description: Great work! Now let's give our bodies time to deeply recover while staying active.
